dict.string: Needs access to your Downloads folder so that CLIProxyAPI can read your config.yaml file.
Needs access to your Desktop so that CLIProxyAPI can read your config.yaml file.
Needs access to your Documents folder so that CLIProxyAPI can read your config.yaml file.
Needs access to network volumes so that CLIProxyAPI can read your config.yaml file.
Needs access to removable volumes so that CLIProxyAPI can read your config.yaml file.
